title: CandleRuntime RWKV v7 load + generate (base path)
goal: Implement load + generate for the RwkvV7 variant per operator E-2 (subquadratic full-feature scope includes RWKV v5/v6/v7). RWKV v7 reference checkpoint: BlinkDL/rwkv-7-world (or rwkv-7-g1-2.9b as the 2026 production-ready World/G1 release).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/rwkv_v7.rs implementing v7 (Goose/G1) architecture forward; adapter.rs CandleModelHandle::RwkvV7 wiring; tests (env-gated).
unblock_conditions: MT-086 RWKV v5/v6 merged (shares state-pattern code).
implementation_notes: Per operator E-2 + refinement INF-9. RWKV v7 (codenamed Goose/G1) introduces decay-vector-eval improvements and channel-mix changes over v6. Reference HuggingFace checkpoint: `BlinkDL/rwkv-7-world` or `BlinkDL/rwkv-7-g1-2.9b` (the smaller G1 2.9B variant is the easiest production reference; larger 7B+ variants exist). candle-transformers Rwkv7 support may need a custom impl if not yet in the latest candle 0.7 release at coder-execution time; in that case, the impl ports from the BlinkDL reference Python code (https://github.com/BlinkDL/RWKV-LM) to candle Tensor ops. Pre-implementation MT (MT-087-prep, if needed; otherwise inlined here): scan candle-transformers HEAD for an Rwkv7 wrapper; if present, use it; if absent, port the v7 time-mix and channel-mix forward functions (Tensor ops only; ~400 LOC). Load: parse config.json (RWKV v7 has additional config fields vs v6: head_size_a, head_size_divisor, ...), build VarBuilder. State: v7 per-layer state structure (token-shift state + time-mix state + channel-mix state per layer). Generate: same pattern as v5/v6. Capabilities: same as v5/v6 (supports_subquadratic=true, others false until parity MTs). Tests (env-gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_RWKV_V7_MODEL_DIR): load v7 model, generate 32 tokens deterministically, assert v7-specific state structure differs from v6.
risk_if_missed: v7 path absent; operator E-2 v5/v6/v7 coverage incomplete.
validator_focus: v7 state shape differs from v6; if porting from BlinkDL ref, output matches reference for fixed prompt (operator-supplied golden).

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Port-from-Python golden test (if candle-transformers lacks v7 at coder time) — output equivalence with BlinkDL ref for a fixed prompt.
v7 state structure asserted distinct from v6.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: RWKV v7 base path uses upstream candle_transformers::models::rwkv_v7 (Model + State + ModelVersion); config parsing accepts head_size aliases (head_size / head_dim / head_size_a) per the BlinkDL G1 reference, version disambiguation routes v7a / v7b / v7 from `version` / `model_version` / `architectures`, and forward path uses the proper batched `forward_seq(&tokens, &mut state)` rather than per-token iteration. State tensor count includes the optional DEA cache (k_cache + v_cache + q_prev) — distinct from v5/v6 by construction. CapabilityNotSupported on steering/LoRA overrides. Tests assert config parsing, version detection, head_size aliases, intermediate_size hidden_ratio fallback, and per_layer state count.
hbr_unsatisfied: HBR-INT-002 — no FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-SUBQ event emission visible at adapter layer.

State tensor count includes the optional DEA cache (k_cache + v_cache + q_prev) — distinct from v5/v6 by construction. CapabilityNotSupported on steering/LoRA overrides. Tests assert config parsing, version detection, head_size aliases, intermediate_size hidden_ratio fallback, and per_layer state count.
